changelog:
* **feat: add background update checker** (6b00a43)
  - Add WorkManager runtime KTX dependency to app build.gradle.kts configuration
  - Create OtaCheckWorker class extending CoroutineWorker for asynchronous background tasks
  - Schedule periodic OTA background worker execution in MainActivity onCreate
  - Require connected network type constraint for background update check worker
  - Set 15-minute periodic interval for WorkManager background check request
  - Apply ExistingPeriodicWorkPolicy KEEP to retain existing worker across app launches
  - Append timestamp parameter to version.json request URL to prevent HTTP caching
  - Set HttpURLConnection request method to GET with 10-second timeout limits
  - Configure custom CQ-WebView-App User-Agent request header for CDN calls
  - Read raw JSON payload using InputStreamReader and BufferedReader streams
  - Parse remote versionCode, versionName, and downloadUrl fields from JSONObject
  - Compare remote versionCode against local app versionCode to detect pending updates
  - Return Result retry on network exceptions or non-OK HTTP status codes
  - Disconnect HttpURLConnection safely in worker finally execution block
  - Expose PREFS_NAME and VERSION_JSON_URL constants in UpdateChecker singleton
  - Add KEY_LAST_NOTIFIED_VERSION_CODE key for tracking notified build versions
  - Define EXTRA_AUTO_UPDATE_DIALOG intent extra constant for notification launches
  - Implement checkAndShowUpdateNotification method to gate duplicate alerts
  - Store last notified version code in SharedPreferences to prevent duplicate popups
  - Upgrade notification channel importance to NotificationManager IMPORTANCE_HIGH
  - Direct notification PendingIntent to MainActivity with CLEAR_TOP intent flags
  - Set notification title to OTA and format body text with version tag prefix
  - Set NotificationCompat priority to PRIORITY_HIGH for heads-up presentation
  - Intercept EXTRA_AUTO_UPDATE_DIALOG extra in MainActivity handleDeepLink handler
  - Clear intent extra flag after reading to prevent redundant update popups
  - Launch manual update check dialog directly when opening app from notification tap
  - Add Send Instant ntfy OTA Push Notification step to GitHub Actions workflow
  - Post high-priority ntfy message with package and rocket tags upon release build
* **style: reorder launcher shortcuts** (434b4ff)
  - Move GitHub shortcut to first position and Telegram to second position
